requirement_summary: The login screen allows users to sign into their accounts using a username and password

test_cases.title: Successfully log in with valid credentials
preconditions: User has a registered account with valid username and password
test_cases.expected_result: User is directed to the dashboard page

test_cases.title: Fail to log in with invalid password
steps: Enter valid username and invalid password

test_cases.title: Fail to log in with unregistered username
steps: Enter unregistered username and any password
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'User not found' is displayed

test_cases.title: Error message appears when fields are left blank
steps: Leave username and password fields blank
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'Please enter username and password' is displayed

test_cases.title: Prevent access to log in with SQL injection
steps: Enter SQL injection code in username and password fields
test_cases.expected_result: System does not allow login and an error message is displayed

gherkin_scenarios.steps:
Given a user is on the login page
When they enter valid username 'testuser' and password 'Password123'
And click the login button
Then they should be directed to their dashboard

Given a user is on the login page
When they enter username 'testuser' and an invalid password 'WrongPassword'
And click the login button
Then an error message 'Invalid password' should be displayed

uncovered_areas: Account lockout after multiple failed attempts
